user.title: Vialitoral CCTV
user.description: Click Submit to discover all Vialitoral highway cameras. No credentials are required.

cameras.title: Select cameras
cameras.description: Choose which cameras to add to Home Assistant. Open the Vialitoral map at {map_url} to see where each camera is located, then pick the ones you want below.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Vialitoral
reconfigure.description: Update your camera selection or refresh interval. Open the Vialitoral map at {map_url} to check camera locations.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Vialitoral API. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Vialitoral is allowed.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Vialitoral has been reconfigured and reloaded successfully.
